series_metadata.series_description: This form, prescribed by the Ohio Public Defender (OPD-206R), is used by appointed counsel attorneys and county public defender office to document the indigency of their clients. This form (or a similar form prescribed by the county and approved by the S

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on-site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Forms for death penalty cases are to be retained for one hundred years., Paper: Shred
